'''Davy Litten''' (born 3 May 2003) is an English professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|fb}} and centre for [[Hull F.C.]] in the [[Super League]].

==Playing career==

===Hull F.C.===
In 2022 he made his [[Hull F.C.|Hull]] début in the [[Super League]] against [[Wakefield Trinity]].<ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/match/EVP3773300 Hull FC 18-26 Wakefield Trinity]</ref>
Litten played 15 matches for Hull F.C. in the [[Super League XXVIII]] season as the club finished 10th on the table.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.hulldailymail.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/hull-fc-high-lows-mid-8799429/|title=Hull FC highs and lows as mid-season resurgence not enough to prevent drop-off|website=www.hulldailymail.co.uk|access-date=2023-10-05|archive-date=2023-10-04|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231004073738/https://www.hulldailymail.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/hull-fc-high-lows-mid-8799429|url-status=dead}}</ref>
Litten played 22 matches for Hull F.C. in the 2025 Super League season as the club finished 7th on the table.<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/grading-each-of-super-leagues-bottom-six-in-2025-with-warrington-getting-the-lowest-marks/|title=Grading each of Super League’s bottom six in 2025 with Warrington getting the lowest marks|website=www.loverugbyleague.com}}</ref>

===York Knights (loan)===
On 16 May 2024 it was reported that he had signed for [[York Knights]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=16 May 2024|author=Callum Walker|title=Franklin Pele makes short-term loan move alongside fellow Hull FC fullback|url=https://www.totalrl.com/franklin-pele-makes-short-term-loan-move-alongside-fellow-hull-fc-fullback/}}</ref>
